---
name: daily-plan
description: Create today's study plan across HPCL, IFFCO, and MSTC using the current repo state.
agent: plan
---

Read [../../.brain/NextSteps.md](../../.brain/NextSteps.md), [../../.brain/Progress.md](../../.brain/Progress.md), [../../.brain/ExamTracker.md](../../.brain/ExamTracker.md), and [../../.brain/StudyPlan.md](../../.brain/StudyPlan.md) first.

Then create a one-day study plan that:

- respects the current date and active exam priority
- follows the 70/20/10 split unless the files say otherwise
- names exact files to read from `Shared-Core`, `HPCL`, `IFFCO`, or `MSTC`
- ends with clear outputs for each study block
